name: LiveAgent
description: Cloud-based helpdesk and live chat platform for customer service, with RESTful API for tickets, contacts, chat, accounts and more.

auth_methods.note: Docs show API v3 and v1 use API keys and provide header examples (Authorization: Bearer and apikey:).

credential_access.note: API keys are created in the LiveAgent admin (Configuration > System > API) in the customer dashboard; signup has a free trial per pricing page so developers can self-serve.

api_surface.note: API v3 is a RESTful API covering tickets, contacts, customers, accounts, chat; interactive per-account OpenAPI (Swagger) descriptor is provided (per-account docs at https://YOURDOMAIN.ladesk.com/docs/api/v3/ and swagger.json).

buildability.note: Public docs describe API endpoints and auth; API keys are generated in the admin and signup with free trial is available, enabling immediate development against a trial account.

queries: LiveAgent pricing API access site:liveagent.com OR site:support.liveagent.com OR site:faq.liveagent.com
LiveAgent API key where to find API key plan pricing "API key" "LiveAgent" site:liveagent.com OR site:support.liveagent.com OR site:faq.liveagent.com
